summary: Read-side aggregation feature, no new domain entity -- same pattern as FINTRACK-20's Budget Overview. Added TransactionRepository.sum_by_month_for_user_in_range (SQLAlchemy extract(), Postgres+SQLite portable) alongside the existing sum_by_category_for_user_in_range for the current-month breakdown. New GetSpendingInsightsHandler, insights DTOs, and GET /api/v1/insights/dashboard router (trend_months query param bounded 1-24). Security: user_id sourced only from JWT via get_current_user_id, no account-scoped request param exists for an IDOR attempt to target. Empty/error-state Gherkin scenarios satisfied by construction (valid zeroed JSON; existing global exception handler already returns generic 500 JSON, no frontend in this repo).
